name: Task Lifecycle & State
description: Defines the core AgentTask model and its full lifecycle: status transitions, runtime context, flags, and property-change notifications. Acts as the central shared data contract for all task-related features.

AgentTask.cs.content:
enum AgentTaskStatus
    Running, Completed, Cancelled, Failed, Queued, Paused, InitQueued, Planning, Verifying, Recommendation, Committing
enum TaskPriority
    Low, Normal, High
enum ModelType
    ClaudeCode, Gemini
enum FeatureModePhase
    None, TeamPlanning, PlanConsolidation, Execution, Evaluation
class AgentTask : INotifyPropertyChanged
  Data: AgentTaskData
  Runtime: RuntimeTaskContext
  L64: OnPropertyChanged([CallerMemberName] string? name = null) -> void
  TaskNumber: int
  Description: string
  StartTime: DateTime
  SkipPermissions: bool
  Headless: bool
  IsFeatureMode: bool
  UseMcp: bool
  SpawnTeam: bool
  ExtendedPlanning: bool
  PlanOnly: bool
  UseMessageBus: bool
  AutoDecompose: bool
  ApplyFix: bool
  UseAutoMode: bool
  AllowFeatureModeInference: bool
  GroupId: string?
  GroupName: string?
  AdditionalInstructions: string

Models/AgentTaskData.cs.content:
class AgentTaskData : ITaskFlags
  Id: string
  TaskNumber: int
  Description: string
  StartTime: DateTime
  SkipPermissions: bool
  Headless: bool
  IsFeatureMode: bool
  IgnoreFileLocks: bool
  UseMcp: bool
  SpawnTeam: bool
  ExtendedPlanning: bool
  PlanOnly: bool
  UseMessageBus: bool
  AutoDecompose: bool
  ApplyFix: bool
  UseAutoMode: bool
  AllowFeatureModeInference: bool
  AdditionalInstructions: string
  StoredPrompt: string?
  ConversationId: string?
  FullOutput: string?
  Model: ModelType
  MaxIterations: int
  CurrentIteration: int
  ProjectPath: string
  ProjectColor: string
  ProjectDisplayName: string
  ImagePaths: List<string>
  GeneratedImagePaths: List<string>

Models/RuntimeTaskContext.cs.content:
class RuntimeTaskContext : IDisposable
  Process: Process?
  Cts: CancellationTokenSource?
  OutputBuilder: StringBuilder
  ConsecutiveFailures: int
  ConsecutiveTokenLimitRetries: int
  LastIterationOutputStart: int
  TokenLimitRetryCount: int
  LastPromptTokenEstimate: long
  LastCliModel: string?
  PreprocessorPrompt: string?
  FeatureContextBlock: string?
  VerificationPrompt: string?
  QueuedReason: string?
  BlockedByTaskId: string?
  BlockedByTaskNumber: int?
  L65: AddDependencyTaskId(string id) -> void
  L66: RemoveDependencyTaskId(string id) -> bool
  L67: ContainsDependencyTaskId(string id) -> bool
  DependencyTaskIdCount: int
  L69: ClearDependencyTaskIds() -> void
  DependencyTaskNumbers: List<int>
  SubTaskCounter: int
  SubTaskIndex: int
  IsPlanningBeforeQueue: bool
  NeedsPlanRestart: bool
  PlanPhaseReady: bool
  PendingFileLockPath: string?
  PendingFileLockBlocker: string?
  PendingCommitTask: Task?

patterns: Separation of persisted data (AgentTaskData) from runtime context (RuntimeTaskContext)
dependencies: Used by virtually every manager and UI component
